name: china-economic-quarterly-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《经济学(季刊)》 (China Economic Quarterly), the Peking University / CCER journal closest to international top-field economics standards in China.

plugins.name: china-economic-quarterly-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the 《经济学(季刊)》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, internationally-legible topic selection, field-benchmarked literature review, structural / quasi-experimental identification, modern staggered-DID compliance, inference rigor, mechanism evidence, figures-over-tables, English abstract, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
